code: import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const projects=[{id:'01',name:'Drone Talk',description:'DroneTalk is an NLP-based intelligent communication system designed to enable seamless interaction between users and drones through natural language commands.
